triples.subject: bat
triples.snippet: The bat to fly relation is supported by the KG fact that bat is capable of fly and text notes about bat flight.

triples.subject: bat
triples.snippet: The bat to mosquito relation is dietary: bat eats mosquito in the demo KG.

triples.subject: bat
triples.snippet: A bat connects to vertebrate through the mammal class: bat is a mammal, and mammal is a vertebrate.

triples.subject: bird
triples.snippet: The bird to vertebrate relation is class inheritance: bird is a vertebrate.

triples.subject: cat
triples.snippet: The cat to mouse relation is dietary: cat eats mouse in the demo KG.

triples.subject: dolphin
triples.snippet: The dolphin to echolocation relation is a property relation: dolphin has property echolocation.

triples.subject: duck
triples.snippet: The duck to swim relation is capability based: duck is capable of swim.

triples.subject: eagle
triples.snippet: The eagle to fish relation is dietary: eagle eats fish in the demo KG.

triples.subject: fish
triples.snippet: A salmon connects to vertebrate through fish: salmon is a fish, and fish is a vertebrate.

triples.subject: frog
triples.snippet: The frog to mosquito relation is dietary: frog eats mosquito in the demo KG.

triples.subject: insect
triples.snippet: The insect to animal relation is class inheritance: insect is an animal.

triples.subject: mammal
triples.snippet: A mammal is a vertebrate animal.

triples.subject: mammal
triples.snippet: The mammal to milk relation is production: mammal produces milk in the demo KG.

triples.subject: mosquito
triples.snippet: A mosquito connects to animal through insect: mosquito is an insect, and insect is an animal.

triples.subject: owl
triples.snippet: The owl to mouse relation is dietary: owl eats mouse in the demo KG.

triples.subject: penguin
triples.snippet: The penguin to swim relation is capability: penguin is capable of swim in the demo KG.

triples.subject: penguin
triples.snippet: A penguin connects to vertebrate through bird: penguin is a bird, and bird is a vertebrate.

triples.subject: salmon
triples.snippet: A salmon connects to vertebrate through fish: salmon is a fish, and fish is a vertebrate.

triples.subject: sparrow
triples.snippet: The sparrow to wings relation is property based: sparrow has property wings.

triples.subject: whale
triples.snippet: The whale to swim relation is capability based: whale is capable of swim.

triples.subject: whale
triples.snippet: A whale connects to vertebrate through mammal: whale is a mammal, and mammal is a vertebrate.
